title: Paul Maynard - Parliamentary Under Secretary at Department for Work and Pensions - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Mr Maynard received advice on taking up a paid role as a consultant with Aon Plc  This advice was considered and provided by ACOBA before it closed on 12 October 2025. The role was taken up on 19 November. The Independent Adviser has not had a role in determining this advice. "
